message:
feat(ft-xbnl0.2.3): cx-first simulation dispatch in ft simulate (tick 279)

Migrates 3 ambient simulation call sites in the `ft simulate` CLI
dispatch to their `_with_cx` siblings.

**Scenario lifecycle (shared `sim_cx` at top of simulate arm):**

- L32135 setup: `scenario.setup_with_cx(&sim_cx, &mock)` — adds panes
  to the mock interface matching the scenario pane roster
- L32182 execute w/ resize timeline:
  `scenario.execute_all_with_resize_timeline_with_cx(&sim_cx, &mock)` —
  fires all events at their scheduled `at` timestamps and records a
  per-stage resize timeline

**Manual event injection loop (local `inject_cx` per iteration):**

- L32339 `mock.inject_with_cx(&inject_cx, event.pane, mock_event)` —
  inside the speed-gated manual event fan-out loop. Iterates each
  event, sleeps to hit the target elapsed timestamp, then injects. Cx
  resolved inside the loop body since the fn doesn't thread cx — each
  iteration picks up whatever Cx is active on the simulate task's
  worker thread.

All three sites form the core `ft simulate` execution path:
1. Load scenario + setup mock panes (setup_with_cx)
2. Either `--resize-timeline-json` mode (execute_all_with_resize_timeline_with_cx)
   OR the default speed-gated inject loop (inject_with_cx per event)

A cx-cancel during simulation (Ctrl-C during a long scenario run) now
cleanly aborts at the next await boundary rather than running out the
full scenario duration.

Verification: `cargo check -p frankenterm --bin ft` compiles clean.

Cumulative ft-xbnl0.2.3 ticks this session: 93 (187-279).
main.rs cross-crate migration total: 170 sites (167 before + 3).
frankenterm-core internal sites: 45 (unchanged this tick).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
